english:
<c=@flavor>"The greater the strike, the greater the counterblow."
—Crusader Vilborg</c>

<c=@flavor>"The grip is made from my own special design, and it even has an extra compartment for extra mouth pieces."
—Tactician Lyan</c>

<c=@flavor>"The hooks are unique to this region. Some people like the way they look."
—Mayor Trisk</c>
<c=@flavor>"The inscription inside the ring is too worn to be discernable."</c>
<c=@flavor>"The inscription worn and illegible."</c>

<c=@flavor>"The inscriptions from the exorcism guide are read while the blade is forged."
—Scholar Worfmir</c>

<c=@flavor>"The Iron Legion is built with soldiers like you. Thank you."
—Helo Murkhaunt</c>

<c=@flavor>"The Iron Legion thanks you. Maybe now we can get back to fixing up this blasted fort."
—Engineer Burlage Firestoker</c>

<c=@flavor>"The jar seems to retain a remarkable amount of heat."
—Ahjj</c>

<c=@flavor>"The less you train with these, the more dangerous you are, to everyone."
—Vigil Tactician Blazefur</c>
<c=@flavor>"The metal was tempered for this area. Those crystals are tough."</c>

<c=@flavor>"The mission isn't done until you come home."
—Brencis Quickblood</c>

<c=@flavor>"The Modniir never saw it coming."
—Forward Scout Greta</c>

<c=@flavor>"The natural law of combat is to attack your enemy until they stop attacking you."
—Explorer Brokkar</c>

<c=@flavor>"The only thing hidden is the true depth of the pain you are going to cause with this."
—Nessa</c>
<c=@flavor>"The only thing safer is a golem."</c>

<c=@flavor>"The order thanks you for all your help."
—Agent Kaukiri</c>

<c=@flavor>"The Pact recognizes your valor in combat."
—Tactician Coehl</c>

<c=@flavor>"The polish on this piece is engineered to keep magical energy in while preventing you from burning your hand."
—Vejj</c>
<c=@flavor>"The power of the charr comes from Iron Legion ingenuity."</c>

<c=@flavor>"The Priory is in your debt. Thank you."
—Arcanist Vance</c>

<c=@flavor>"The Priory sent us this shipment of underwater weapons. Must have been a mix-up somewhere."
—Magister Roslin</c>

<c=@flavor>"The queen and the Seraph honor you."
—Erika Rane</c>

<c=@flavor>"The quicker they fall, the less noise they make."
—Solita Miststalker</c>
<c=@flavor>"The ring of the Sun-God will bring you power and perception."—Qoetl</c>

<c=@flavor>"The sea is as deep as fate's are intertwined."
—Magister Izzmek</c>

<c=@flavor>"The sea is as deep as fates are intertwined."
—Magister Izzmek</c>

<c=@flavor>"The smallest fang can cause the deadliest wound."
—Shifting Waves</c>
<c=@flavor>"The spikes are for opening jammed access panels, not for use as a weapon. Just kidding. Everything's a weapon."</c>
<c=@flavor>"The string is made from wurm gut."</c>

<c=@flavor>"The summer sun shone bright once more, warmed wood and cloth of home."</c>
—Zephyrite Song

<c=@flavor>"The tools you collected will help maintain the wall. Use these weapons as your tools against the Risen." 
—Brannen</c>

<c=@flavor>"The trick is a little rabbit fur around the top, and tie it down with a little luck all around."
—Deno</c>

<c=@flavor>"The trolls weave these in their hair. I can't explain it. Maybe they may have some magical powers."
—Lionguard Cern</c>

<c=@flavor>"The truffle is a symbol of survival in tough times."
—Matlal</c>

<c=@flavor>"The truffle oil is mixed with our tribal magic."
—Matlal</c>

<c=@flavor>"The very staff I modified in order to determine the mystic harmonics originating from the stones."
—Scholar Inka</c>

<c=@flavor>"The Vigil recognizes your steadfastness in battle."
—Crusader Rugan</c>
<c=@flavor>"The way of codes and shadows."</c>

<c=@flavor>"The weight is more deadly than the blade."
—Vigil Crusader Rugan</c>

<c=@flavor>"The writing in these are ancient and beautiful. Makes you wonder what else was lost when Ascalon fell."
—Jinell</c>

<c=@flavor>"Their metal working rivals that of the norn."
—Researcher Raekk</c>

<c=@flavor>"There are better axes, but out here, a blade's a blade when it comes to protecting our families."
—Barnaby</c>
<c=@flavor>"There are far to many trolls here. Take a tooth from the big one if you wish." -Quennida</c>

<c=@flavor>"There are less passive ways to clean up a problem."
—Carmel</c>

<c=@flavor>"There is no trick to being a good hunter, just practice. The more you've eaten, the more you've had to practice. I practice a lot."
—Ichtaca</c>

<c=@flavor>"There is nothing quiet about our guns."
—Mensorr</c>

<c=@flavor>"There is nothing quieter than a sharp blade on a dark night."
—Sizza</c>

<c=@flavor>"There's a sucker born every minute. Did I say sucker? I meant collector."
—Cin</c>

This item only has value as part of a collection.

<c=@flavor>"There's dried flowers in the padding to cover up that after-battle stench. It doesn't help much, but I try."
—Priory Explorer Cyara</c>
<c=@flavor>"There's more rust than iron left here."</c>

<c=@flavor>"There's more than one way to make a blade. These have a touch of the local plants used to fuel our forges."
—Tovar</c>

<c=@flavor>"There's only one thing better than a sword..."
—Tripp</c>
<c=@flavor>"There, see? Isn't this pistol worth all the explosions, monstrous wurms, giant mosquitoes, and undead you had to go through?" —Admiral Clarinda Demard</c>

<c=@flavor>"These always break off at the worst possible time."
—Mara Ripsaw</c>

<c=@flavor>"These always bring me good luck."
—Tamor Woodreave</c>

<c=@flavor>"These are a bit snug, but they don't look too bad."
—Fisherman Carter</c>

<c=@flavor>"These are far too dangerous to refill. It is nice to look at though. "
—Engineer Verutum</c>

<c=@flavor>"These are forged from heavy steel. Takes an edge like nothing else."
—Vigil Crusader Rugan</c>

<c=@flavor>"These are made from specially grown trees. We add a rare ore to the soil. The young sapling becomes almost too hard to cut down."
—Warden Llew</c>

<c=@flavor>"These are pretty. So pretty."
—Recruit Tochacatl</c>

<c=@flavor>"These are specially padded to protect you and the artifacts."
—Explorer Cryptcutter</c>

<c=@flavor>"These aren't ACTUALLY everburning. But they will keep your feet from getting charred up around here."
—Brencis Quickblood</c>

<c=@flavor>"These badges are amazing. There are so many interesting ranks, positions, honors. It was quite a complex military organization."
—Researcher Raekk</c>

<c=@flavor>"These boots are made for battle."
—Zalvax Brokenclaw</c>

<c=@flavor>"These boots are made to crush corruption beneath them."
—Toka Axegrinder</c>

<c=@flavor>"These briars are nearly indestructible."
—Warden Spy Alarin</c>

<c=@flavor>"These can also hold ale."
—Shengra</c>

<c=@flavor>"These can take just about anything that undead thing has to throw at us."
—Warmaster Chan</c>

<c=@flavor>"These creatures are just fleeing the undead. It's a shame that they encroach upon the village and have to be dealt with so harshly."
—Quennida</c>

<c=@flavor>"These crystals have some kind of energy. I've modified a standard bow with them. Let me know how it works."
—Olenn</c>
<c=@flavor>"These gaskets make good rings. I wonder what kind of metal this is."—Garrius</c>

<c=@flavor>"These guns have so many gears, I'm sure the one this is from wont be missing it."
—Legionnaire Sleekfur</c>

<c=@flavor>"These have a special filter to handle all the tar."
—Engineer Verutum</c>

<c=@flavor>"These have saved more than one patrol."
—Fahrtak Shatterfiend</c>

<c=@flavor>"These help deflect the blast away from your more...sensitive...areas."
—Centurion Truthbringer</c>

<c=@flavor>"These help deflect the spent casings from a rapid rate of fire."
—Legionnaire Sleekfur</c>

<c=@flavor>"These help for those really dark caves."
—Adgils</c>

<c=@flavor>"These help neutralize naturally occurring red-cap toxins."
—Elain</c>

<c=@flavor>"These help us escort caravans to the Pact base."
—Zara</c>

<c=@flavor>"These help us handle the large amounts of natural magic in the area."
—Scholar Daphne</c>

<c=@flavor>"These help you move the eggs safely."
—Braxa Scalehunter</c>

<c=@flavor>"These may be a little heavier than normal, but that can come in handy."
—Crusader Rugan</c>

<c=@flavor>"These must have some kind of old power inbued in them."
—Seraph Soldier Dianna</c>
<c=@flavor>"These patterns must date all the way back to when Orr was still a thriving place."</c>

<c=@flavor>"These seem to be expired. Not good for launch anything but a conversation."
—Lightbringer Krentch</c>

<c=@flavor>"These should keep you safe until we can get more supplies."
—Magister Kathryn</c>

<c=@flavor>"These sometimes misfire due to the skritt's inability to maintain them."

<c=@flavor>"These spikes might have served a tactical purpose in battle, perhaps to denote rank."
—Tactician Sebastian</c>

<c=@flavor>"These steins are crafted extra sturdy. They won't break over a bandit's head, and the can block a centaur arrow without leaking any ale."

<c=@flavor>"These still have a little residual arcane energy. We are going to need every little magical scrap and crumb to defeat Zhaitan."
—Scholar Blix</c>

<c=@flavor>"These summoning stones have led to great breakthroughs in some of my more boot-related research."
—Scholar Inka</c>

<c=@flavor>"These weapons have been changed by this area. They really creep me out."

<c=@flavor>"These were stolen a while back. It's nice to have them back."
—Zara</c>

<c=@flavor>"These will come in handy during a long battle."
—Remaris Earshot</c>

<c=@flavor>"These will keep you safe until we get more supplies."
—Magister Kathryn</c>

<c=@flavor>"These won't rescue you from the Risen, but they will offer you some extra protection."

<c=@flavor>"They burn us; we burn them."

<c=@flavor>"They love these sticks."
—Braxa Scalehunter</c>
<c=@flavor>"They said I set a record, but hey, who's counting?" —Braham</c>

<c=@flavor>"They said it couldn't be done, but I did it. The legions first tactical torch."

<c=@flavor>"They said it couldn't be done, but I did it. The Pact's first tactical torch."
—Tactician Lyan</c>

<c=@flavor>"They say charr don't like to swim? Ha! If there are Branded to kill, I love it."

<c=@flavor>"Think before you leap."

<c=@flavor>"This core has cooled, making it too hard to work with."

<c=@flavor>"Using a warhorn does two things: it alerts to danger and calls for help."
